Access your AHS Compass and sync your records to the server.

📁 Save PDF to Folder
Choose where to save your PDF report. Your selection is remembered for this session so future reports go straight to the same folder.
⚠️ Your browser doesn't support folder picking (requires Chrome or Edge 86+). The PDF will download to your default Downloads folder instead.
AHS Compass
AHS Compliance Consulting

My clients

Pick a client to work on. Everything you record is saved to that client and is waiting for you next time you come back — whether that is days, weeks or years.

Site tools (some clients)
✎ Working on client Changes saved to this client
Employee view: this is all a member of staff sees

● Company setup

Set up this client's company profile. These details identify the business across the system and feed the report headers. Everything here is saved to this client.

● Risk profile
Build the profile top to bottom: 1 set the document control, 2 add and complete the risks, 3 record monitoring & assurance, 4 score the management maturity. The summary stays at the top; each panel below opens and closes on click.

1 Document control & scoring key

version, review dates, approval

2 Risks — add & complete the profile

3 Monitoring & assurance

leading & lagging indicators

4 Management maturity assessment

six domains, 0-5

● Risk review — by hazard type & SIF register

summary & energy analysis

● Management system

Assess the client's health and safety management arrangements against the HSG65 plan, do, check, act cycle. For each duty: is it in place, is it adequate, and what action is needed where it falls short. The duty headings are seeded; add the requirement lines and references yourself.

● Review & feedback

A quality and progress picture for this client, with your rating tracked over time. Generate the Consultant Feedback report from the Reports tab.

● Document register

Key H&S documents for this client — policies, assessments, certificates, insurances. Links only (OneDrive / SharePoint); nothing is uploaded here. Each document's status is worked out from its review date.

● Accreditation readiness

Common Assessment Standard (Build UK, Version 5). Summaries are our own wording plus question numbers, not the Build UK source text. Use this to see what each scheme needs and where the app already holds the evidence.

● Assurance records

Monthly capture, quarterly review
Pick a month and enter that month's figures below. The inspections and audits scores fill in automatically from your inspections. Save when you are done.

● Risk assessment register

A register of this client's risk assessments and RAMS, with where each PDF lives. A web link (SharePoint, OneDrive, a URL) opens the document; a file path on the client's system is shown with a Copy button to paste into File Explorer.

Your active workplace profile
Your Active Checklist
Edits to this checklist apply to all new inspections of this type. Already-submitted inspections are not affected.
Inspection Lists
Built from UK H&S legislation and HSE guidance. Select a workplace scenario, then browse sections. Tick individual items to cherry-pick, or add a whole section to your checklist in one click.
Select Inspection Type
My Library
Saved snapshots of inspection types you've built. Load any back into the type you're currently editing.
Report Branding
Set once — your branding is embedded into every PDF report you generate.
